en:
## Installation
1. Download `sabotage-dark.toml` to `~/.config/wezterm/colors/`.
2. In `wezterm.lua`:
```lua
config.color_scheme = "Sabotage Dark"
```
pt:
## Instalação
1. Baixe `sabotage-dark.toml` para `~/.config/wezterm/colors/`.
2. No `wezterm.lua`:
```lua
config.color_scheme = "Sabotage Dark"
```
